auth.title: Sign in
auth.intro: Sign in with your account or continue with an FNMT certificate.

status.loginError: We couldn't sign you in. Check your details and try again.
status.networkError: We couldn't reach the service. Check your connection and try again.

username.label: Username
username.hint: Use the username assigned to your account.

certificate.hint: You'll be redirected to the secure certificate flow. If an FNMT certificate is installed, your browser will ask you to select it.
certificate.unavailable: FNMT certificate sign-in is only available in desktop browsers.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.intro: Use the recovery flow to regain access to your account.
resetPassword.configuredHint: Continue to the recovery service to set a new password securely.
resetPassword.unavailable: Password recovery is not configured in this environment yet. Contact your administrator.
